ast.source: From your Spotify Developer Dashboard app
ast.target: 来自您的 Spotify 开发者控制台应用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Must exactly match the Redirect URI added in your Spotify app settings.
ast.target: 必须与您 Spotify 应用设置中添加的重定向 URI 完全匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder to save reports in. Leave blank to save in the vault root.
ast.target: 用于保存报告的保险库文件夹。留空则保存在保险库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force re-authentication on the next run.
ast.target: 强制在下次运行时重新进行身份验证。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Spotify Sorter: Opening browser for Spotify authorization...
ast.target: Spotify 排序器：正在打开浏览器进行 Spotify 授权...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Spotify 排序器：令牌已清除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Spotify Sorter: Set your Client ID and Client Secret in plugin settings first.
ast.target: Spotify 排序器：请先在插件设置中设置您的客户端 ID 和客户端密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Spotify 排序器：正在验证身份...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Spotify Sorter: Fetching your library — this may take a moment...
ast.target: Spotify 排序器：正在获取您的曲库——这可能需要一些时间...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Spotify Sorter: All liked songs are already in at least one playlist.
ast.target: Spotify 排序器：所有已喜欢的歌曲都已至少在一个播放列表中。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 查找未整理的 Spotify 曲目

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create a Spotify app at developer.spotify.com, add obsidian://spotify-auth as a Redirect URI, then paste your credentials below.
ast.target: 在 developer.spotify.com 创建一个 Spotify 应用，将 obsidian://spotify-auth 添加为重定向 URI，然后在下方粘贴您的凭据。
